other_observers: None; First found by Marty Wolfe on COS CBC , 12/15/2012
specific_location: Intersection of Willow Circle and Colorado Boulevard, Colorado Springs.
description: Woodpecker with glossy black back , showing white rump and white wing patches in flight , white and black facial pattern , red crown , white iris , black streaking on upper breast .Behaviors: Repeatedly taking peanuts from a feeder and placing them in the main trunk of an adjacent cottonwood. Residential area.Call: Load weka weka call matching that on my Bird JamPlumage: adult
